checks.name: SECTION_AVAILABILITY_CASCADED
checks.description: semantic-candidates section available via cascaded capability

checks.name: PROPOSITION_COUNT_CORRECT
checks.description: Intake reports correct proposition count from SPE

checks.name: CLASS_DISTRIBUTION_CORRECT
checks.evidence: STRUCTURAL_DOMINANCE: 12, COUPLING_PATTERN: 34, AUTHORITY_TOPOLOGY: 10, TIER_GROUNDING: 12, HERO_MOMENT_GROUNDING: 6, CLUSTER_ARCHITECTURE: 1

checks.name: CEU_COVERAGE_COMPUTED
checks.description: CEU coverage derived from proposition ceu_refs

checks.name: DERIVATION_HASH_PRESERVED
checks.description: Derivation hash passed through to intake summary

checks.name: BLOCKERS_RECHARACTERIZED
checks.evidence: BLK-001 RESOLVED, BLK-003 RESOLVED, BLK-004 RESOLVED, BLK-006 RESOLVED; BLK-002 PROPOSITION_REVIEW_PENDING, BLK-005 PROPOSITION_DEBT_PENDING, BLK-007 NO_SEMANTIC_AUTHORITY

checks.name: LANE_STATES_UPDATED
checks.description: Promotion state lanes reflect SPE completion
checks.evidence: semantic_candidate: COMPLETE, review_queue: PENDING, crosswalk: INAPPLICABLE, reconciliation: COMPLETE, qualification_debt: PENDING

checks.name: POSTURE_CORRECT
checks.description: Qualification posture resolved correctly for SPE path
checks.evidence: Posture: QUALIFICATION_PENDING (review_obligations.json exists with 0 obligations — pre-existing state)

checks.name: PROGRESSION_PATH_AWARE
checks.description: Progression path shows SPE-specific derivation step

checks.name: BLUEEDGE_UNCHANGED
checks.description: BlueEdge capabilities unaffected by SPE probes
checks.evidence: blueedge semantic_candidates: false, semantic_propositions: false — BlueEdge routes through loadBlueEdgeCandidates()

checks.name: CSR_PATH_PRESERVED
checks.description: CSR intake path preserved as first-priority in resolver
checks.evidence: resolveCsrIntake() called when candidate_csr.json exists — SPE path only attempted when CSR absent

checks.name: RESOLVED_BLOCKER_FILTERING
checks.description: QualificationPostureResolver filters resolved blockers for crosswalk check
checks.evidence: unresolvedBlockers = blockers.filter(b => !b.resolved) — resolved crosswalk blocker no longer triggers CROSSWALK_ACTIVE

checks.name: GOVERNANCE_DISCLAIMER_SPE
checks.description: SPE path carries proposition-specific governance disclaimer
checks.evidence: disclaimer: 'Semantic propositions are CANDIDATE (L3 ceiling). Not canonical semantic authority. Operator review required.'
